reviews.review_description: Dear friends, I am the developer of this game, which was developed by me and my fellow painters. It is very difficult to develop the game in China, because you will encounter denials from this country, from society, and from family. But as always, we came to Facebook and came to oculus, and through layers of technical assessments, we completed the initial demo of this game. The game is now 5% complete. We hope to finish this game. I will review the comments of other players. To get answers to improve the game, I will seriously answer every comment from players from other parts of the world!
Dont get what I suppose yo do with Chica man, he keep pointing at the stars and I drop them and they explode but nothing elae

developer_response.body:
I’m so sorry. I’ve only seen it now. Recently, I have encountered something that has caused a bad mood. My parents are from a very remote and backward area in China. They deny our work worthless. This leads me to despair and even hope to end it. life!
Thank you for your comment. This is the first one. You can try to pick up the star, throw it into the cloud, and it will eat it. Through your reminder, we will update the next version on the head of the chicken man. , Add a hint that the clouds eat the stars, if you like drums, I believe you will like our second level, you can choose the music you like, and call the wind and rain, we will try again before Christmas, update

reviews.review_description: I'm clueless on how to even start need a tutorial or help. Love concept! I'm worried about you, you seem very talented!

developer_response.body: Sorry, I just saw it now, because I am busy updating the game, we will complete more content in the second level, can you tell me, where are you stuck?
